title: Norwegian Crusted Dinner
description: A flavorful dinner featuring a crusty crust topped with butter and served with solo ingredients.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Place the crust on the prepared baking sheet.
Mix the butter, dinner herbs, and Norwegian salt. Brush the mixture on the crust.
Place the flaky fish fillets on the crust, leaving a 1-inch border around each fillet.
Bake for 12-15 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and the fish is cooked through.
Remove from the oven and let it rest for 2-3 minutes.
Serve with sliced lemons on the side if desired.
